name: hidden-prompt-regression
description: All traces are status OK with normal metrics, but a recent deployment broke the system prompt for the research-assistant agent — the instructions section is now empty, causing the agent to give generic unhelpful answers. Only visible by inspecting span input/output content.
projectMemory:
## Project Agents
- **research-assistant**: Answers research questions using RAG over internal docs. Typical trace has 2-4 LLM calls, 1-2 retrieval steps. Normal latency: 3-8s per trace.
- **ticket-router**: Routes support tickets to the right team. Single LLM call, ~400ms.
- **report-generator**: Generates weekly reports. 3-5 LLM calls, 10-30s.

## Baselines
- Error rate: <1%
- Daily cost: ~$12
- Trace volume: ~200/day
- research-assistant: ~120/day
- ticket-router: ~60/day
- report-generator: ~20/day

spans.note: No errors. Token counts dropped ~40% vs prior day but still within broad 'normal' range.

input.input_preview:
You are a helpful assistant.

## Instructions


## Retrieved Context
Document 1: The Q4 2025 revenue was $14.2M, up 23% from Q3...
Document 2: The sales team expanded to 45 people in Q4...

Question: What was our Q4 revenue growth?
input.output_preview: Based on the information provided, there was some revenue. I hope this helps! Let me know if you have any other questions.

input.input_preview:
You are a helpful assistant.

## Instructions
You are a research assistant for Acme Corp employees. Answer questions accurately using ONLY the retrieved context below. Always cite the specific document. If the context doesn't contain the answer, say so explicitly — never make up information.

## Retrieved Context
Document 1: The Q3 2025 revenue was $11.5M...

Question: What was Q3 revenue?
input.output_preview: According to Document 1, Q3 2025 revenue was $11.5M.
